input: Design BI architecture for our company including KPI framework and dashboard hierarchy
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces KPI metric tree (north star to operational), semantic layer design, dashboard hierarchy (L1-L4), self-service analytics strategy, visualization standards, and platform governance

input: Create a semantic layer so all teams calculate revenue the same way
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces semantic layer design with tool comparison (dbt MetricFlow vs Cube vs LookML), metric definitions, dimension modeling, access control, and drift prevention strategy

input: We're a 5-person startup with no BI tools. Where do we start?
expected_behavior: Skill activates with startup-appropriate recommendations: one dashboard tool, shared metric definitions, basic access control, avoiding over-engineering, semantic layer deferred until 10+ reports

input: Set up self-service analytics with guardrails so business users can explore data safely
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces governed vs exploratory zones, user segmentation, compute guardrails (query timeouts, row limits, cost quotas), training plan, and feedback loop design

input: Set up a dbt project with staging models and incremental materializations
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate. This is a data transformation/analytics engineering request. Should route to analytics-engineering skill instead.
